equipmentMods.amulet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss while Bloodlust is active has a 10% chance to give a stack of Life, increasing your Health by 1% per stack (stacks up to 100)
equipmentMods.belt: Lightning Plasma: Fires an additional Lightning Plasmas, and deals an additional 5% based on Lighting Plasma range.
equipmentMods.bracer: Drinking a potion will not heal you, Gain 15% Elemental damage per potion slot instead
equipmentMods.goblet: Ferocity of Wolves: One of your wolves will transform into an Electric Bat. Bats leap twice as much.
equipmentMods.helmet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss has a 10% to trigger a Bloodlust effect, gain 5% crit damage, 2% armor and 0.35% movement speed per stack. Stacks up to 100, lasts 15 seconds.
equipmentMods.horn: Ferocity of Wolves: Your wolves now leap an additional times.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 100 Armor for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Ferocity of Wolves: Your wolves now leap an additional times.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 1% Critical Chance for every 50 of your highest stat
equipmentMods.ring1: Gain 15 Physical Damage for every 150 of your highest stat.
